mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.matched_phenotypes: neonatal hemolytic anemia, metabolic acidosis with normal or increased urinary excretion of hippuric acid and xanthine, seizures, microcephaly, hypopigmentation, hepatosplenomegaly, pancreatitis, renal failure

macroyctic anemia, reticulocytosis, jaundice, splenomegaly, gallstones
neurological symptoms including psychomotor regression, vertical supranuclear gaze palsy, pyramidal signs, peripheral neuropathy, liver involvement
mental deterioration, spastic quadriplegia, ketotic comas, vomiting, dehydration, lethargy, apnea
growth retardation, severe neurodegenerative disorder, characteristic hair changes, copper deficiency
